prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-LUDDRDPWRCG-2PC-LG-BRWN-HPNR Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): RC Dinosaur Existing Title: RC Tyrannosaurus rex Dinosaur toy with Light, sound, and music Description: Dominate the prehistoric world with the remote radio control Jurassic Rex RC Dinosaur.

This 11" RC Dinosaur comes with a multi-function remote that allows you to control this predator's movements including forward function, fast forward function, dance function, and stop function.

Watch this carnivorous beast come to life with awesome sounds and light up spikes on his back that set him apart from the competition.

The Jurassic Rex RC Dinosaur is the perfect gift for kids over 3 years old. Order yours before our inventory goes extinct. Search Terms: rc toys dinosaur toy rc gift radio control remote control Features: - Large 11" RC Dinosaur - Brown - Has Light Up Spikes and Makes Dinosaur Sounds - Multi-Function Remote Controls - Requires 5 "AA" Batteries (Not Included) - Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: RC Dinosaur 11in Brown T-Rex with Light and Sound

openai.item_name: RC Dinosaur 11-in Brown Remote Control T-Rex Toy

anthropic.title_differentiation: Multi-Function Remote Control, Light Up Spikes, Dinosaur Sounds, Ages 3 Plus

openai.title_differentiation: Light Up Spikes, Dinosaur Sounds, Multi Function Remote, Forward Fast Forward Dance Stop, Requires 5 AA Batteries, Ages 3
